name: TWO HARBORS INVESTMENT CORP.
summary: PART I Overview Two Harbors Investment Corp. is a Maryland corporation founded in 2009 that invests in, finances and manages mortgage servicing rights (MSR) and Agency residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS) and, through its operational platform, RoundPoint Mortgage Servicing LLC (RoundPoint), is one of the largest servicers of conventional loans in the country. Agency refers to a U.S. government sponsored enterprise (GSE), such as the Federal National Mortgage Association (Fannie Mae), or...
